project.name: slz-readiness
project.description: 4-phase Sovereign Landing Zone readiness audit tool for Azure tenants. Copilot CLI plugin.

children.title: Overview
children.prompt: Explain what slz-readiness is and the 4-phase pipeline. Reference README.md:1-92 and docs/architecture.md:1-54.

children.title: Installation
children.prompt: Install via /plugin install inside Copilot CLI, plus dev clone via pip install -e. Cite README.md:20-62, apm.yml:1-52, .github/plugin/plugin.json:1-63.

children.title: Quick Start
children.prompt: Walk the five slash commands with expected outputs. Cite .github/prompts/*.prompt.md and .github/skills/*/SKILL.md.

children.title: Artifacts & Outputs
children.prompt: findings.json, gaps.json, plan.md, bicep/*.bicep, scaffold.manifest.json, trace.jsonl. Cite engine.py, discover/cli.py, scaffold/engine.py.

children.title: Architecture Overview
children.prompt: 4 phases, data contracts, anti-hallucination contract. Cite docs/architecture.md, docs/anti-hallucination.md, scripts/slz_readiness/evaluate/models.py.

children.title: Plugin Mechanics
children.prompt: apm.yml, plugin.json, agent definition, skills, prompts, MCP servers. Cite apm.yml, .github/plugin/plugin.json, .github/agents/slz-readiness.agent.md.

children.title: Hooks: Pre- and Post-Tool-Use
children.prompt: pre_tool_use.py verb allowlist; post_tool_use.py citation guard. Cite hooks/pre_tool_use.py:1-85, hooks/post_tool_use.py:1-89, tests/test_hooks.py.

children.title: Phase Summaries (v0.5.0)
children.prompt: Deterministic per-phase summaries + run.summary.md roll-up. Cite scripts/slz_readiness/_summary.py, plan/summary_cli.py, scaffold/cli.py:_write_run_rollup, tests/test_hooks.py::test_plan_summary_not_filtered.

children.title: Phased Rollout & Scope-Aware Deployment (v0.5.1)
children.prompt: MG template scope fix, TEMPLATE_SCOPES, scope-aware az deployment commands, Audit->Enforce rollout, DINE identity propagation, how-to-deploy.md. Cite scripts/scaffold/avm_templates/management-groups.bicep, scripts/slz_readiness/scaffold/template_registry.py, scripts/slz_readiness/scaffold/engine.py, scripts/slz_readiness/scaffold/cli.py, scripts/scaffold/param_schemas/*.schema.json.

children.title: CLI & Scope Enforcement
children.prompt: Discover CLI — tenant+subscription scope, Click entry, run_scope. Cite discover/cli.py:88-227, .github/skills/discover/SKILL.md.

children.title: Discoverers (6 modules)
children.prompt: mg_hierarchy, subscription_inventory, policy_assignments, identity_rbac, logging_monitoring, sovereignty_controls. Cite discover/*.py.

children.title: Azure CLI Wrapper & Error Classification
children.prompt: run_az, AzError, tree-kill timeouts, _progress, _trace. Cite discover/az_common.py, discover/_progress.py, _trace.py.

children.title: Deterministic Rule Engine
children.prompt: engine.py selector, aggregate=tenant, unknown-gap path, sort determinism. Cite evaluate/engine.py:1-169, evaluate/cli.py, evaluate/models.py.

children.title: Matchers
children.prompt: equals, contains_all, policy_assignments_include, archetype_policies_applied, any_subscription_has_workspace. Cite evaluate/matchers.py:1-111.

children.title: Rules Catalogue
children.prompt: Walk every YAML under scripts/evaluate/rules/. Table of rule_id, design_area, severity, matcher, baseline path, template. Cite each rule YAML.

children.title: Baseline Vendoring & Integrity
children.prompt: vendor_baseline.py download + SHA verify, baseline_integrity.py, _manifest.json, VERSIONS.json, rules-resolve CI gate. Cite those files.

children.title: Phase 3: Plan
children.prompt: LLM narration, citation guard, sequential-thinking MCP, design-area grouping. Cite .github/skills/plan/SKILL.md, hooks/post_tool_use.py.

children.title: Scaffold Engine & Template Registry
children.prompt: scaffold/engine.py dedup-by-(template,scope), RULE_TO_TEMPLATE registry, archetype auto-resolution, JSON-Schema validation. Cite scaffold/engine.py, scaffold/template_registry.py.

children.title: AVM Bicep Templates
children.prompt: 7 templates in scripts/scaffold/avm_templates/ + schemas. Cite each .bicep file, each .schema.json.

children.title: Orchestration (/slz-run)
children.prompt: slz-run prompt, phase sequencing, pauses, --no-pause. Cite .github/prompts/slz-run.prompt.md, .github/instructions/slz-readiness.instructions.md §6.

children.title: Release Process
children.prompt: scripts/release.py bumps four files; release.yml verifies tag; zip packaging. Cite scripts/release.py:1-125, .github/workflows/release.yml.

children.title: Testing Strategy
children.prompt: unit tests (golden determinism, scaffold dedup, scope flags, hook decisions), whatif bicep build. Cite tests/unit/*.py, tests/test_hooks.py, .github/workflows/ci.yml.
